MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; Clerk: P. Dias/D.Boffi; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Elizabeth T. Erhardt, Esq. represented Plaintiff Vincent Ng and Defendant Theresa Salaverria appeared in pro per. Co-Defendant, Alfonso Salaverris was unable to attend. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
